name: Makoto - What's in the box?
description:
Makoto - Pervert with a box

Another lazy Sunday bot ^^ it's a bit of a stupid bot lol nothing special just a fun one maybe? Although I wasn't sure if I should make the character a femboy or a futa but I decided to go with femboy with this one because why not? ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

Anyway have fun and Like always, any advice/feedback on how to improve is always welcomed :3

For suggestion/requests contact me on discord!

Art by: https://x.com/ikemeru19/media
creator: LizzyTheLizardWizard
